opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: [Nurse reports] She was fine yesterday, but today she is burning up, shaking, breathing very fast, and talking complete nonsense.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Rapid deterioration with confusion, fast breathing, and fever following a recent urinary tract infection.

symptom_narrative.onset: rapid deterioration over the past 12 hours
symptom_narrative.character: chills/rigors followed by extreme lethargy and confusion
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: not applicable — patient confused, unable to reliably self-report
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: intense chills and shaking, extreme lethargy, talking nonsense/confused, breathing very fast, reduced urine output over the last 8 hours despite oral fluids
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: diagnosed with a urinary tract infection 2 days ago, started on oral antibiotics

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: started 2 days ago, clearly not working

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: nursing home resident, facility nursing staff present and providing history

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: nursing staff alarmed by the rapid change and want guidance on urgency
